choices: so complex for the new employees to understand
too complex for the new employees to understand
very complex for the new employees understanding
complex enough for the new employees to understand
such complex that the new employees to understand
problems.stem: The instructions for the assembly of the new furniture were ________ without the help of a professional. It seemed that every step involved a complex diagram and technical jargon that was unfamiliar to the average person. We spent hours just trying to decipher the first page.
problems.explanation: '너무 ~해서 ...할 수 없다'는 부정의 의미는 `too ~ to ...` 구문으로 표현합니다. `too complex for the new employees to understand`는 '직원들이 이해하기에는 너무 복잡했다'는 의미입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: Despite the immense pressure from the board members to cut costs, the CEO was ________ her vision for long-term investment in research and development. She believed that short-term savings would ultimately harm the company's innovative edge.
problems.explanation: '~할 만큼 충분히 ...한'이라는 긍정의 의미는 `형용사 + enough + to부정사` 구문으로 표현합니다. `brave enough to defend`는 '옹호할 만큼 충분히 용감했다'는 의미입니다.

problems.instruction: 밑줄 친 to부정사의 부사적 용법이 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
choices: He must be very diligent to finish all that work in a single day.
She was delighted to receive an unexpected gift from her friend.
I went to the post office to mail a package to my family abroad.
You were foolish to trust a complete stranger with your money.
He must be out of his mind to make such an irresponsible decision.
problems.explanation: ③번은 '소포를 부치기 위해'라는 '목적'을 나타냅니다. 나머지는 모두 '감정의 원인'(②) 또는 '판단의 근거'(①, ④, ⑤)를 나타내는 부사적 용법입니다.

problems.instruction:
다음 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 가장 유사한 것을 고르시오.
                    The famous pianist grew up in a small town, only to become a world-renowned musician.
choices: She studied hard to pass the final exam.
He was shocked to hear about the sudden accident.
The boy woke up to find himself famous overnight.
They must be wealthy to live in such a large house.
I promise to be more careful next time.
problems.explanation: <보기>의 `only to become`은 '~했지만 결국 ...하게 되다'라는 '결과'의 용법입니다. ③번의 `to find` 역시 '잠에서 깨어났고, 그 결과 발견했다'는 의미로 '결과'를 나타내므로 쓰임이 가장 유사합니다.

problems.instruction:
다음 우리말을 영어로 가장 잘 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
                    그 상자는 내가 혼자 들기에는 너무 무거웠다.
choices: The box was so heavy for me that I lift it alone.
The box was heavy enough for me to lift by myself.
The box was too heavy for me to lift by myself.
The box was very heavy that I could not lift it alone.
The box was such heavy for me to lift by myself.
problems.explanation: '너무 ~해서 ...할 수 없다'는 의미는 `too ~ to ...` 구문으로 표현합니다. to부정사의 의미상 주어는 `for me`로 나타냅니다. 따라서 `The box was too heavy for me to lift by myself.`가 가장 정확합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The politician spoke ________ to convince the skeptical audience of his sincerity. He used clear language and provided concrete evidence to support his claims, hoping to win their trust.
problems.explanation: '~할 만큼 충분히 ...하게'라는 의미는 `부사 + enough + to부정사` 구문으로 표현합니다. 동사 `spoke`를 수식하는 부사 `persuasively`가 `enough` 앞에 와야 합니다.

problems.instruction:
밑줄 친 to부정사의 부사적 용법이 <보기>와 같은 것을 고르시오.
                    <보기> She must be very kind to help those in need so consistently.
choices: We were all surprised to see him at the party.
He trained relentlessly every day to win the gold medal.
You are wise to reconsider your initial decision.
The explorer traveled far, only to discover an uninhabited island.
The water is clean enough to drink directly from the stream.
problems.explanation: <보기>는 '돕다니'라는 '판단의 근거'를 나타냅니다. ③번 역시 '재고하다니' 현명하다는 '판단의 근거'를 나타내므로 용법이 같습니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 문장 중 어법상 올바른 것을 고르시오.
choices: The coffee is too hot for to drink.
He is strong enough for lift that heavy box.
She was disappointed for hearing the test results.
The problem was too complicated for him to solve.
They woke up early so as for catch the first train.
problems.explanation: ④번은 `too ~ for [목적격] to ...` 구문에 완벽하게 부합하는 올바른 문장입니다. 나머지는 모두 어법상 오류가 있습니다.

problems.instruction:
다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
                    ◦ The puzzle was ________ difficult for a child to complete.
                    ◦ It is ________ late to apologize for what you have done.
problems.explanation: 두 문장 모두 '너무 ~해서 ...할 수 없다'는 부정적 의미를 내포하며, `형용사 + to부정사` 구조를 가집니다. 이 구조에 가장 잘 맞는 부사는 `too`입니다.

problems.instruction:
다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때, 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
                    그는 그 경주에서 우승할 만큼 충분히 빨리 달리지 못했다.
                    -> He did not run ________ ________ ________ win the race.
problems.explanation: '...할 만큼 충분히 ~하게'라는 의미는 `부사 + enough + to부정사` 구문을 사용합니다. 따라서 `fast enough to`의 순서가 되어야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: It is crucial ________ all team members to be present at the meeting tomorrow. The project manager has announced that a major decision regarding the project's future will be made, and every member's input is considered vital. Missing this meeting could lead to significant misunderstandings and might negatively affect the overall workflow and individual responsibilities. Therefore, attendance is not just recommended but is a fundamental requirement for the project's success.
problems.explanation: to부정사(to be present)의 의미상 주어를 나타내는 문제입니다. 형용사 'crucial'은 사람의 성품이 아니므로, 일반적인 경우에 해당하는 for + 목적격을 사용합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: It was very thoughtful ________ you to prepare a warm meal for me when I was sick. I was feeling miserable and didn't have the energy to cook for myself. Your kindness was a great comfort and helped me recover more quickly. I truly appreciate your considerate gesture; it is a clear reflection of your caring personality. Such actions make a real difference in someone's day.
problems.explanation: to부정사(to prepare)의 의미상 주어를 나타내는 문제입니다. 형용사 'thoughtful'(사려 깊은)은 사람의 성품을 나타내므로, of + 목적격을 사용합니다.

problems.instruction:
Choose the one that is grammatically incorrect.
                    It is ①considered ②impolite ③for a person ④to interrupt someone while they are speaking, especially in a formal ⑤discussion.
problems.explanation: 형용사 'impolite'(무례한)는 사람의 성품이나 태도를 평가하는 형용사이므로, to부정사의 의미상 주어는 'of a person'이 되어야 합니다. 따라서 ③ 'for'가 틀렸습니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The CEO expects ________ to meet the quarterly sales targets. He has made it clear that failure to do so will result in a thorough review of the current marketing strategies. The pressure is high, but he believes in the team's potential. He has provided all the necessary resources and support to ensure that the goal is achievable.
problems.explanation: 동사 'expect'는 `expect + 목적어 + to부정사`의 5형식 구조를 취합니다. 따라서 목적어인 all employees가 바로 와야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: It was quite foolish ________ him to invest all his savings in such a volatile stock without any prior research. Financial advisors consistently warn against such impulsive decisions. His actions demonstrated a lack of prudence and foresight, leading to a significant financial loss. This situation serves as a cautionary tale for others considering high-risk investments.
problems.explanation: 형용사 'foolish'(어리석은)는 사람의 성품이나 판단력을 평가하는 형용사이므로, to부정사의 의미상 주어는 of + 목적격으로 표현합니다.

problems.instruction:
Choose the one that is grammatically incorrect.
                    The teacher ①encouraged her students ②for them ③to participate actively in the class discussion, ④believing it would enhance their ⑤critical thinking skills.
problems.explanation: 동사 'encourage'는 `encourage + 목적어 + to부정사`의 5형식 구조를 취합니다. 'her students'가 목적어이자 의미상 주어이므로, ② 'for them'은 불필요한 중복입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: It is not easy ________ a non-native speaker to master the subtle nuances of English idioms. It requires a great deal of exposure to the language through books, movies, and conversations with native speakers. Many learners find this aspect of the language challenging yet rewarding, as understanding idioms is a key step toward true fluency.
problems.explanation: 형용사 'easy'는 행위의 난이도를 설명하며 사람의 성품을 나타내지 않으므로, to부정사의 의미상 주어는 일반적인 규칙인 for + 목적격을 사용합니다.

problems.instruction:
Choose the one that is grammatically incorrect.
                    It was ①very wise ②for her ③to consult with a lawyer before ④signing the contract, which ultimately prevented a lot of potential ⑤trouble.
problems.explanation: 형용사 'wise'(현명한)는 사람의 성품을 평가하는 형용사이므로, to부정사의 의미상 주어는 'of her'가 되어야 합니다. 따라서 ② 'for her'가 틀렸습니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The defendant decided ________ silent during the interrogation. His lawyer had advised him that this was the best course of action until he could review the evidence presented by the prosecution. This legal strategy is often employed to avoid self-incrimination. The defendant understood the importance of this advice and followed it precisely.
problems.explanation: 문장의 주어('The defendant')와 to부정사('to remain')의 의미상 주어가 일치하므로, 의미상 주어를 별도로 표시하지 않고 동사 뒤에 바로 to부정사를 씁니다.

problems.instruction:
Choose the one that is grammatically incorrect.
                    It is ①necessary ②for the government ③taking immediate action to address the growing environmental concerns. Scientists have warned that ④delaying further could lead to ⑤irreversible damage to the ecosystem.
problems.explanation: 'It is + 형용사 + for + 목적격 + to부정사' 구문에서, 의미상 주어 뒤에는 to부정사가 와야 합니다. 따라서 동명사 형태인 ③ 'taking'은 틀렸으며, 'to take'로 고쳐야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The scientist is now celebrated for his groundbreaking theories, but he seems ________ a significant calculation error in his early research papers published decades ago.
problems.explanation: 주절 동사는 현재(`seems`)이지만, '계산 실수를 한 것'은 '수십 년 전'의 일이므로 주절보다 앞선 과거의 일입니다. 따라서 완료부정사인 to have made가 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: Despite being a top executive, Mr. Henderson is known for his humility and genuinely wants ________ with the same courtesy he shows to others, regardless of their position.
problems.explanation: 주어인 Mr. Henderson이 '존중받기를' 원하는 것이므로, 수동의 의미를 나타내는 수동부정사 to be respected가 필요합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The old castle on the hill is believed ________ by a noble family in the 15th century, although no definitive records of its construction have ever been found.
problems.explanation: 성이 '지어진' 것은 '15세기'라는 명백한 과거의 사실이므로, 주절(is believed)보다 앞선 시제를 나타내는 완료 시제가 필요합니다. 또한, 성은 '지어지는' 것이므로 수동태가 필요합니다. 따라서 완료수동 부정사인 to have been built가 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The politician issued a public apology, stating that he was deeply sorry ________ such a controversial remark during the live debate last week.
problems.explanation: `be sorry to V` 구문에서 과거의 일(`last week`에 발언한 것)에 대해 유감을 표현할 때는 완료부정사를 사용하여 시제가 앞섰음을 명확히 합니다. 따라서 to have made가 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The final project proposal is due this Friday, and the professor expects it ________ in a professional format, free of any grammatical errors.
problems.explanation: to부정사의 의미상 주어는 목적어인 `it`(제안서)입니다. 제안서는 '제출되는' 것이므로 수동의 의미를 나타내는 수동부정사 to be submitted가 와야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The escaped prisoner was reported ________ by several witnesses near the old warehouse a few days before the police finally captured him.
problems.explanation: 죄수가 '목격된' 것은 보고된 시점(과거)보다 '며칠 전'이므로, 주절보다 앞선 시제를 나타내는 완료 시제가 필요합니다. 또한, 죄수는 '목격된' 것이므로 수동태가 필요합니다. 따라서 완료수동 부정사인 to have been seen이 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The young actress claims ________ the famous director at a film festival last year, an encounter that she says changed her career path entirely.
problems.explanation: 주장하는 시점(현재, claims)보다 감독을 '만난' 시점(`last year`)이 더 과거이므로, 완료부정사인 to have met을 사용해야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The priceless jewel, now missing from the museum, is said ________ by an international crime syndicate two nights ago during a severe thunderstorm.
problems.explanation: 보석이 '도난당한' 시점(`two nights ago`)은 주절(is said)보다 이전이므로 완료 시제가 필요합니다. 또한, 보석은 '도난당하는' 것이므로 수동태가 필요합니다. 따라서 완료수동 부정사인 to have been stolen이 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The former manager is alleged ________ a large sum of money from the company's pension fund over a period of five years before his retirement.
problems.explanation: 혐의를 받는 시점(현재, is alleged)보다 '횡령한' 행위는 과거의 일이므로 완료부정사가 필요합니다. 횡령은 그가 직접 한 능동 행위이므로, to have embezzled가 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The ancient Roman aqueduct appears ________ with remarkable precision, as it still stands today as a testament to their advanced engineering skills.
problems.explanation: 수로가 '건설된' 것은 명백한 과거의 사실이므로, 현재 '보이는' 시점보다 앞선 과거의 일을 나타내는 완료 시제가 필요합니다. 또한, 수로는 '건설되는' 것이므로 수동태가 필요합니다. 따라서 완료수동 부정사인 to have been constructed가 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The demanding project manager made all his team members ________ overtime last weekend to meet the strict deadline, despite their prior commitments. This decision, while unpopular, was deemed necessary for the project's success.
problems.explanation: 사역동사 `make`는 목적격 보어로 원형부정사(동사원형)를 사용합니다. 따라서 `made his team members` 뒤에는 동사원형인 work가 와야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: From my window on the second floor, I could feel the entire house ________ slightly whenever a large truck passed by on the main road. The vibration was subtle but definitely noticeable.
problems.explanation: 지각동사 `feel`은 목적격 보어로 원형부정사(동사원형)나 현재분사(-ing)를 사용합니다. 선택지에 원형부정사 shake가 있으므로 이것이 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The suspect was seen ________ the building through a back door shortly after the alarm went off. This testimony from a key witness was crucial to the police investigation.
problems.explanation: 지각동사 `see`가 수동태(`was seen`)로 사용될 경우, 목적격 보어였던 원형부정사는 to부정사로 바뀌어야 합니다. 따라서 to enter가 올바른 형태입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: To ensure the accuracy of the financial statements, the company chairman had an independent auditor ________ all the accounting records from the past fiscal year.
problems.explanation: 사역동사 `have`는 목적어(`an independent auditor`)가 능동적인 행위를 할 때 목적격 보어로 원형부정사(동사원형)를 사용합니다. 따라서 review가 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: If the new trade agreement is to succeed, it must foster an environment of mutual trust and cooperation. The government announced that it ________ all barriers to free trade as a sign of goodwill.
problems.explanation: 'be to 용법'은 예정, 의무, 가능, 운명, 의도 등을 나타냅니다. 문맥상 "정부는 ~ 제거할 예정이다"라는 미래의 계획을 나타내는 것이 가장 자연스러우므로 is to remove가 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The ancient prophecy foretold that a hero would emerge from the common people and that he ________ his nation from tyranny, but no one knew when or how this would happen.
problems.explanation: 'be to 용법' 중 '운명'을 나타내는 경우입니다. "그가 그의 나라를 구할 운명이었다"는 의미가 문맥상 가장 적절합니다. 주절 동사가 과거(`foretold`)이므로 시제를 일치시켜 was to save를 사용합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The manager was very strict about the rules. He clearly stated that all employees ________ their identification cards at all times while on the premises. This was a matter of security.
problems.explanation: 'be to 용법' 중 '의무'를 나타내는 경우입니다. "모든 직원들은 신분증을 착용해야 한다"는 강한 규칙이나 의무를 나타내므로 are to wear가 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: Despite the thorough search conducted by the rescue team in the dense forest, not a single trace of the missing hiker ________. The situation grew more desperate as the sun began to set.
problems.explanation: 'be to 용법' 중 '가능'을 나타내며 수동태와 결합된 형태입니다. "어떠한 흔적도 발견될 수 없었다"는 의미로, 주어인 'a single trace'는 '발견되는' 대상이므로 수동형인 was to be found가 적절합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The witness claimed ________ the suspect at the scene of the crime on the night of the incident, but his testimony was inconsistent with the physical evidence.
problems.explanation: 주장하는 시점(현재, claimed)보다 용의자를 본 시점(`on the night of the incident`)이 더 과거이므로, 완료부정사인 to have seen을 사용해야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The ancient manuscript is thought ________ by a monk in the 12th century, but its exact origin remains a subject of scholarly debate.
problems.explanation: 원고가 '쓰여진' 시점(`in the 12th century`)은 주절(is thought)보다 이전이므로 완료 시제가 필요합니다. 또한, 원고는 '쓰여지는' 것이므로 수동태가 필요합니다. 따라서 완료수동 부정사인 to have been written이 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: Many health experts suggest that a balanced diet is crucial for overall well-being. For instance, my nutritionist recommended that I change some of my eating habits. Specifically, she suggested ________ more whole grains and fresh vegetables into my daily meals. She explained that this simple change could significantly improve my energy levels and long-term health. I have decided to follow her advice, hoping to see positive results soon.
problems.explanation: 동사 suggest(제안하다)는 목적어로 동명사를 취하는 대표적인 동사입니다. 따라서 동명사 형태인 incorporating이 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: ________ a foreign language is a challenging yet rewarding endeavor. It not only opens up new cultural perspectives but also enhances cognitive abilities such as problem-solving and memory. Many people start with great enthusiasm but find it difficult to maintain their motivation. Therefore, setting realistic goals and practicing consistently are key factors for success. It requires patience and a significant amount of dedication over a long period.
problems.explanation: 문장의 동사는 `is`이므로, 빈칸에는 주어 역할을 할 수 있는 명사 상당어구가 와야 합니다. 동명사 Learning(배우는 것)은 문장에서 주어 역할을 할 수 있습니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The marketing team had a long discussion about the new advertising campaign. They couldn't agree on the main slogan. After several hours of debate with no conclusion, the manager decided ________ the meeting and to reconvene the next day with fresh ideas. He hoped that a short break would help everyone think more creatively and come to a consensus.
problems.explanation: 동사 decide(결정하다)는 미래의 행동에 대한 결정을 의미하므로, 미래지향적인 to부정사를 목적어로 취합니다. 따라서 to postpone이 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: My grandmother is very active and always eager to try new things. She recently bought a new smartphone and is not afraid of ________ new applications on her own. She spends a lot of time watching tutorials and reading online guides. Her willingness to learn inspires everyone in our family. She believes that age is just a number and one should never stop learning.
problems.explanation: `be afraid of`에서 `of`는 전치사입니다. 전치사의 목적어 자리에는 명사 또는 동명사가 와야 하므로, 동명사 형태인 experimenting with가 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: To ensure the safety of all employees, the company implemented a new security protocol. This protocol requires everyone to wear an ID card at all times within the building. The management strictly enforces this rule and does not tolerate any exceptions. Therefore, all employees must avoid ________ the facility without proper identification to prevent any security breaches.
problems.explanation: 동사 avoid(피하다)는 목적어로 동명사를 취하는 대표적인 동사입니다. 따라서 동명사 형태인 entering이 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: After a long and successful career, Professor Davis is finally retiring next month. The university is holding a farewell party in his honor. As his former student, I am very grateful for his guidance and support over the years. I have already sent my RSVP for the party, and I truly look forward to ________ him again and expressing my gratitude in person.
problems.explanation: `look forward to ~ing`는 '~을 고대하다'라는 관용 표현으로, 여기서 `to`는 전치사입니다. 따라서 뒤에는 동명사인 seeing이 와야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: One of the most important aspects of personal finance is ________ a monthly budget. It helps you track your income and expenses, allowing you to understand where your money is going. Without a clear budget, it is easy to overspend and fall into debt. Therefore, the first step toward financial freedom is to create a realistic plan for your money.
problems.explanation: be동사 `is`의 주격 보어가 필요한 자리입니다. '가장 중요한 것 중 하나는 ~하는 것이다'라는 의미를 나타내기 위해 동명사 creating이 와야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The customer service representative was very polite. I had an issue with a recent online order, and I was quite frustrated. When I called, she listened patiently to my problem. Before ending the call, she asked, "Would you mind ________ a short survey about your experience with us today?" Her calm and helpful attitude made me feel much better about the situation.
problems.explanation: `Would you mind ~?`는 '~해주시겠어요?'라고 정중하게 부탁하는 표현으로, 동사 mind(꺼리다)는 목적어로 동명사를 취합니다. 따라서 completing이 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: Despite ________ under immense pressure from the media and the public, the investigative team continued their work with professionalism. They knew that finding the truth was their utmost priority. They meticulously reviewed every piece of evidence and interviewed all potential witnesses. Their dedication eventually paid off when they uncovered the crucial information that solved the case.
problems.explanation: Despite는 '~에도 불구하고'라는 의미의 전치사입니다. 전치사 뒤에는 목적어로 명사나 동명사가 와야 하므로, 동명사 working이 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: After the engine failure, the pilot had to make an emergency landing. It was a very risky situation, but his extensive training prepared him for such a crisis. He finished ________ all the necessary safety checks just moments before touching down. Thanks to his quick thinking and expertise, all passengers and crew members were able to disembark safely. The airline praised him for his composure and skill.
problems.explanation: 동사 finish(끝내다)는 목적어로 동명사를 취하는 대표적인 동사입니다. 따라서 동명사 형태인 performing이 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: Even after so many years, I can still vividly remember ______ my grandmother's stories by the fireplace during the cold winter evenings. Her voice was so soothing, and her tales were full of magic and adventure. Those moments are cherished memories that I hold dear to my heart. They shaped my imagination and my love for storytelling. I often wish I could go back in time just to experience one of those evenings again.
problems.explanation: `remember` + 동명사는 '과거에 ~했던 것을 기억하다'는 의미입니다. 문맥상 과거의 경험을 회상하고 있으므로 동명사 hearing이 적절합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: Before you submit your final essay, please remember ______ it for any spelling or grammatical errors. A well-written paper can be undermined by careless mistakes. It is a crucial step that many students overlook when they are in a hurry. Taking just a few extra minutes for proofreading can significantly improve your grade and show your professor that you are diligent and thorough in your work.
problems.explanation: `remember` + to부정사는 '미래에 ~할 것을 기억하다'는 의미입니다. 문맥상 앞으로 에세이를 '검토해야 할 것'을 잊지 말라는 의미이므로 to부정사 to check가 와야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: I will never forget ______ the Eiffel Tower lit up at night for the first time. I was standing on the Champ de Mars, and suddenly thousands of sparkling lights brought the structure to life. It was a truly magical and unforgettable moment. The sight was far more impressive in person than in any photograph I had ever seen. That memory is one of the main reasons I want to visit Paris again.
problems.explanation: `forget` + 동명사는 '과거에 ~했던 것을 잊다'는 의미입니다. 과거에 에펠탑을 '보았던' 경험을 잊지 못할 것이라는 의미이므로 동명사 seeing이 적절합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: When I arrived at the office, I realized with a jolt that I had forgotten ______ the main door of my apartment. I was so preoccupied with the big presentation I had to give that morning. I immediately called my neighbor and asked if she could please go over and check for me. Thankfully, she confirmed that the door was securely locked, and I was able to focus on my work without worrying for the rest of the day.
problems.explanation: `forget` + to부정사는 '미래에 ~해야 할 것을 잊다'는 의미입니다. 문을 '잠가야 했는데 그 사실을 잊고 잠그지 않았다'는 의미이므로 to부정사 to lock이 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The CEO publicly stated that he deeply regrets ______ the concerns of his employees earlier. He admitted that the management should have listened more carefully to the feedback provided during the initial stages of the project. He promised to foster a more open and communicative environment within the company moving forward, ensuring that every voice is heard and valued.
problems.explanation: `regret` + 동명사는 '과거에 ~했던 것을 후회하다'는 의미입니다. 과거에 직원들의 우려를 '무시했던' 사실에 대해 후회하고 있으므로 동명사 ignoring이 와야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: As the hiring manager, I regret ______ you that we have chosen to move forward with another candidate for the position. We received an overwhelming number of applications from highly qualified individuals, and the decision was extremely difficult. We appreciate your interest in our company and the time you invested in the interview process. We wish you the best of luck in your future endeavors.
problems.explanation: `regret` + to부정사는 '~하게 되어 유감이다'라는 의미로, 좋지 않은 소식을 전달할 때 사용됩니다. 불합격 소식을 '전하게 되어 유감'이라는 내용이므로 to부정사 to inform이 적절합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: Despite the pouring rain and strong winds, the dedicated rescue team tried ______ the stranded hikers on the mountain. The conditions were treacherous, and every step was a challenge. They knew they were racing against time as the temperature continued to drop. Their relentless effort and bravery were the only hope for the hikers who were waiting to be saved.
problems.explanation: `try` + to부정사는 '~하려고 노력하다, 애쓰다'는 의미입니다. 구조팀이 조난당한 등산객들에게 '도달하려고 애썼다'는 의미가 되어야 하므로 to부정사 to reach가 가장 적절합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The baby wouldn't stop crying, and her parents were getting desperate. They had already fed her and changed her diaper. As a last resort, the father tried ______ some classical music on his phone. To his surprise, the soothing melody of Mozart almost instantly calmed the baby, and she soon fell asleep. He made a mental note of this new, effective method.
problems.explanation: `try` + 동명사는 '시험 삼아 한번 ~해보다'는 의미입니다. 아버지가 '시험 삼아 클래식 음악을 틀어보았다'는 맥락이므로 동명사 playing이 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: My grandfather had been a heavy smoker for over forty years. However, when his first grandchild was born, he made a firm decision to stop ______. He said he wanted to live a long and healthy life to watch her grow up. It was a difficult journey for him, but his love for his family gave him the strength to succeed. Now, he is healthier and happier than ever.
problems.explanation: `stop` + 동명사는 '~하는 것을 그만두다'는 의미입니다. 할아버지가 '흡연을 그만두었다', 즉 금연했다는 의미이므로 동명사 smoking이 와야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: During our long drive across the country, we often had to stop ______ for gas and stretch our legs. On one such occasion, we pulled into a small town in the middle of nowhere. We found a charming little diner and ended up having the best pie we had ever tasted. These unplanned stops often led to the most memorable parts of our journey.
problems.explanation: `stop` + to부정사는 '~하기 위하여 멈추다'는 목적의 의미입니다. '주유를 하기 위해' 운전을 멈췄다는 의미가 자연스러우므로 to부정사 to get이 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: Despite ________ a novice in the field of data analysis, she managed to produce a report that impressed the entire management team. Her dedication and quick learning ability were evident in the final presentation, which led to her being assigned to a more significant project.
problems.explanation: 동명사 'being'의 의미상 주어는 원칙적으로 소유격을 사용합니다. 따라서 '그가 초보자임에도 불구하고'라는 의미를 나타내기 위해 소유격 대명사 his를 사용하는 것이 문법적으로 가장 올바릅니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The committee expressed serious concern about ________ failing to meet the safety standards outlined in the initial agreement. This oversight could lead to significant financial penalties and a loss of public trust if not addressed immediately.
problems.explanation: 동명사 'failing'의 의미상 주어는 'the company'입니다. 동명사의 의미상 주어는 명사의 소유격 형태로 나타내므로 the company's가 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The city council is debating the possibility of ________ being closed for repairs, which would inevitably cause major traffic disruptions for several weeks. They are currently exploring alternative routes and public transportation options to mitigate the inconvenience to citizens.
problems.explanation: 동명사 'being'의 의미상 주어는 무생물인 'the main bridge'입니다. 의미상 주어가 무생물일 경우, 소유격('s)을 붙이기보다 명사 형태 그대로(목적격)를 사용하는 것이 더 자연스럽습니다. 따라서 the main bridge가 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: Frankly, I am getting tired of ________ complaining about the workload every single day without offering any constructive solutions. We all have a lot to do, but constant negativity doesn't help anyone and only lowers team morale.
problems.explanation: 동명사 'complaining'의 의미상 주어는 'you'입니다. 동명사의 의미상 주어는 소유격으로 표현하는 것이 문법적 원칙이므로 your가 가장 적절합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The scholarship committee was disappointed by ________ not providing the required letters of recommendation with his application. This procedural failure was the primary reason his otherwise strong profile was not considered for the final round.
problems.explanation: 동명사 'providing'의 의미상 주어는 'the applicant'이며, 소유격인 the applicant's로 표현해야 합니다. 동명사의 부정은 동명사 바로 앞에 'not'을 위치시킵니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The ultimate success of this collaborative research hinges on ________ sharing data openly and communicating effectively. Without a transparent flow of information, the project is unlikely to achieve its ambitious goals.
problems.explanation: 동명사 'sharing'의 의미상 주어가 'every scientist involved'라는 긴 구(phrase)일 경우, 소유격('s)을 붙이면 어색해지므로 목적격(명사구 형태 그대로)을 사용하는 것이 일반적입니다. 따라서 every scientist involved가 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: We were all genuinely shocked by ________ winning the marathon, as he had been struggling with an injury for months. His victory was a testament to his incredible perseverance and mental fortitude.
problems.explanation: 동명사 'winning'의 의미상 주어는 '그(he)'입니다. 동명사의 의미상 주어로 대명사를 사용할 경우, 격식체에서는 반드시 소유격 대명사인 his를 사용해야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The unexpected power outage was a result of ________ struck by lightning during the severe thunderstorm. The maintenance crew is now working to restore electricity to the affected areas as quickly as possible.
problems.explanation: 동명사 'being'의 의미상 주어는 무생물인 'a transformer'입니다. 의미상 주어가 무생물일 경우 소유격보다 명사 형태 그대로(목적격)를 사용하는 것이 더 자연스럽습니다. 따라서 a transformer being struck가 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The new policy insists on ________ wearing a helmet at all times within the construction site. This rule was implemented to prevent serious injuries and ensure the well-being of all workers.
problems.explanation: 동명사 'wearing'의 의미상 주어는 'everyone'입니다. 'everyone'과 같은 부정대명사는 소유격을 만들어 동명사의 의미상 주어로 사용할 수 있으므로 everyone's가 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: There is little chance of ________ changing his mind once he has made a decision. He is known for his stubbornness, but it is also a sign of his strong conviction in his own judgments.
problems.explanation: 동명사 'changing'의 의미상 주어는 'he'이며, 이를 소유격 대명사인 his로 표현해야 합니다. 따라서 'his changing his mind'가 올바른 형태입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The astronaut is incredibly proud of _________ on the moon, an experience he recounts with great emotion. He often tells young students that the moment his boots touched the lunar surface was the culmination of a lifelong dream and years of rigorous training. This memory, he explains, serves as a constant reminder that with perseverance, even the most ambitious goals are attainable. His story continues to inspire a new generation of explorers to look towards the stars and pursue their own seemingly impossible dreams.
problems.explanation: 주절의 동사는 현재(`is`)이지만, 달 위를 걸었던 사건은 명백한 과거의 일입니다. 주절의 시제보다 앞선 시점의 일을 동명사로 표현할 때는 완료동명사인 having walked를 사용해야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The famous actress dislikes _________ like a public object rather than a person, especially when she is out with her family. She understands that public interest is part of her career, but she finds the constant scrutiny and lack of privacy exhausting. In a recent interview, she expressed her wish for people to remember that celebrities are human beings with feelings. She simply wants to enjoy simple moments without being followed or photographed. Her plea is for more respect and personal space from both the media and the public.
problems.explanation: 여배우가 '취급받는 것'을 싫어한다는 의미이므로 수동형 동명사가 필요합니다. 일반적인 상황을 나타내므로, 단순 수동동명사인 being treated가 가장 적절합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The customer wrote a formal complaint about _________ poorly by the staff at the hotel the previous day. He mentioned that the lack of respect was unacceptable and demanded an apology. This incident highlights the importance of customer service training, as a single negative experience can significantly damage a brand's reputation. The hotel manager later contacted him to resolve the issue, acknowledging the validity of his complaint about the past event.
problems.explanation: 고객이 형편없는 대우를 받은 것은 편지를 쓴 시점(과거)보다 더 이전(`the previous day`)에 일어난 일이므로 완료 시제가 필요합니다. 또한, 고객은 대우를 '받은' 것이므로 수동태가 필요합니다. 따라서 완료수동 동명사인 having been treated가 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: During the trial, the suspect finally admitted _________ the confidential documents to a rival company a month before his arrest. His confession shocked the courtroom, as he had vehemently denied any wrongdoing up to that point. The prosecutor presented evidence that corroborated his statement, detailing the timeline of the data transfer. This admission is a critical turning point in the case, making a conviction highly likely. The defense attorney had no choice but to change his strategy to focus on mitigating the sentence.
problems.explanation: 문서를 훔친 행위는 인정한 시점(과거)보다 명백히 이전에 일어난 일이므로, 완료동명사 having stolen을 사용해야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The shy student avoids _________ by the teacher because he is afraid of giving the wrong answer in front of the class. He prefers to listen quietly and process the information on his own. While his written work is excellent, his fear of public speaking prevents him from participating actively in discussions. The teacher, noticing his anxiety, is considering alternative ways for him to demonstrate his understanding, such as small group activities or one-on-one sessions, to help him build confidence.
problems.explanation: 학생이 선생님에 의해 '호명되는 것'을 피한다는 의미이므로 수동의 의미가 필요합니다. 일반적인 현재의 상황이므로, 단순 수동동명사인 being called on이 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The former city official strongly denied _________ any bribes during his term in office. He claimed that the accusations were politically motivated and designed to ruin his reputation. In a press conference, he presented documents that he argued proved his financial transparency. "My record is clean," he stated firmly, "and I am confident that a full investigation will exonerate me." Despite his firm denial, the prosecutor's office has announced it will proceed with a formal inquiry into the matter.
problems.explanation: 뇌물을 받았다고 추정되는 시점은 부인한 시점(과거)보다 더 이전이므로, 완료동명사 having accepted를 사용해야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The scientist expressed her frustration about _________ in the recent news article, which she felt distorted her research findings. The article sensationalized a minor aspect of her work, leading to public misunderstanding. She explained that her study was about a potential correlation, not a definitive cause, as the journalist had claimed. She is now considering writing a letter to the editor to clarify her position and correct the public record, emphasizing the importance of accurate science communication.
problems.explanation: 연구가 왜곡된 것은 좌절감을 표현한 시점(과거)보다 더 이전에 일어난 일이므로 완료 시제가 필요합니다. 또한, 연구 결과가 '왜곡된' 대상이므로 수동태가 필요합니다. 따라서 완료수동 동명사인 having been misrepresented가 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The teenager deeply resents _________ what to do by his parents all the time, as he feels he is old enough to make his own decisions. He argues that constant guidance, while well-intentioned, undermines his sense of independence and self-trust. He wishes they would give him more freedom to learn from his own mistakes. This conflict is a common source of tension in their household, reflecting the natural struggle for autonomy during adolescence. His parents, on the other hand, worry about the potential risks he might face.
problems.explanation: 십대 소년이 부모님에 의해 무엇을 해야 할지 '듣는 것(지시받는 것)'에 분개하는 것이므로 수동의 의미가 필요합니다. '항상' 일어나는 일반적인 상황이므로, 단순 수동동명사인 being told가 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: Despite _________ the final exam, the student was praised by his professor for his remarkable improvement throughout the semester. The professor noted that the student's initial diagnostic test was very poor, but his consistent effort and engagement in class were exemplary. "Your final grade doesn't reflect the tremendous growth you've shown," the professor told him. "I am proud of your hard work." This encouragement motivated the student to retake the course with renewed determination.
problems.explanation: 기말고사에 낙제한 것은 칭찬을 받은 시점(과거)보다 이전에 일어난 일이므로 완료동명사를 사용해야 합니다. 학생이 시험에 '낙제했다'는 것은 능동의 의미이므로, having failed가 가장 적절합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The defendant insisted on his innocence, despite _________ at the scene of the crime by three independent witnesses. His lawyer argued that his client was a victim of mistaken identity and presented an alibi that was difficult to verify. The prosecution, however, remained confident in the witness testimonies. They pointed out the consistency in the descriptions provided by the witnesses, who had no connection to each other. The jury now faces the difficult task of weighing the defendant's persistent denial against the compelling eyewitness accounts.
problems.explanation: 피고인이 목격된 것은 결백을 주장한 시점(과거)보다 이전에 일어난 일이므로 완료 시제가 필요합니다. 또한, 피고인은 '목격된' 대상이므로 수동태가 필요합니다. 따라서 완료수동 동명사인 having been seen이 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: Despite the initial challenges of moving to a new country, Sarah is now thriving. She has made new friends and is performing well in her studies. She often writes to her family back home, telling them about her experiences. In her latest email, she mentioned that she is particularly excited about the upcoming winter break. She is really looking forward to _______ her family after being away for almost a year. Her parents are equally excited and are already planning a big welcome-home party for her.
problems.explanation: 'look forward to ~ing'는 '~하기를 고대하다'라는 관용 표현으로, 여기서 'to'는 전치사입니다. 따라서 뒤에는 동명사인 seeing이 와야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The city council proposed a plan to build a new shopping mall in the downtown area, arguing it would boost the local economy. However, many local residents and small business owners are concerned about the potential negative impacts. They believe it will lead to increased traffic congestion and drive small, independent shops out of business. At the public hearing, a representative for the local community stood up and stated that they strongly object to _______ the new mall without a more thorough environmental and economic impact assessment.
problems.explanation: 'object to ~ing'는 '~하는 것에 반대하다'라는 관용 표현으로, 여기서 'to'는 전치사입니다. 따라서 뒤에는 동명사인 building이 와야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The comedy show was so hilarious that the entire audience was in stitches from beginning to end. The comedian's witty observations about everyday life were incredibly relatable and cleverly delivered. One particular joke about the struggles of assembling furniture from a box was so perfectly timed and acted out that I found it impossible to remain serious. Even though I tried to hold it in, I could not help _______ out loud along with everyone else.
problems.explanation: 'cannot help ~ing'는 '~하지 않을 수 없다'라는 관용 표현으로, 동명사를 목적어로 취합니다. 따라서 laughing이 와야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: Now that the final exams are over, my friends and I have decided to take a short trip to unwind. We considered several options, like visiting a theme park or relaxing at a beach. However, since we all share a love for the outdoors and nature, we settled on a more active plan. This weekend, we are planning to go _______ in the national park, which is famous for its beautiful trails and breathtaking scenery. We have already packed our gear and are excited for the adventure.
problems.explanation: 'go ~ing'는 '~하러 가다'라는 의미로, 주로 레저 활동을 나타내는 관용 표현입니다. 따라서 '등산하러 가다'는 go hiking으로 표현합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: When I visited my grandmother last Sunday, her kitchen was filled with the delicious aroma of baking. She was preparing for the annual town bake sale, a charity event she has participated in for over twenty years. The kitchen counter was covered in flour, and there were trays of cookies cooling on the rack. She was so focused on her task that she barely noticed me come in. She was busy _______ a batch of her famous apple pies, carefully arranging the lattice crust on top.
problems.explanation: 'be busy ~ing'는 '~하느라 바쁘다'라는 관용 표현입니다. 이 구문에서 'busy' 다음에는 동명사가 와야 하므로 preparing이 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: My brother has always been passionate about cars, especially vintage models from the 1960s. Last year, he bought a rusty old convertible that had been sitting in a barn for decades. Most people thought it was a lost cause, but he saw its potential. He decided to restore it himself rather than hiring a professional. He spent his entire summer vacation _______ the engine, replacing the upholstery, and giving it a new coat of paint. His dedication was impressive.
problems.explanation: 'spend + 시간/돈 + ~ing'는 '시간/돈을 ~하는 데 쓰다'라는 관용 표현입니다. 시간 목적어 'his entire summer vacation' 뒤에는 동명사인 fixing이 와야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: When Maria first moved to Seoul to study, she faced several cultural and linguistic barriers. Although she had studied Korean for two years in her home country, she found that understanding fast, colloquial speech was a real challenge. Furthermore, navigating the complex subway system was initially overwhelming for her. Like many newcomers, she had difficulty _______ to the fast-paced lifestyle of such a large metropolis. However, with time and effort, she gradually became more comfortable and confident.
problems.explanation: 'have difficulty (in) ~ing'는 '~하는 데 어려움을 겪다'라는 관용 표현입니다. 이 구문에서는 동명사가 뒤따라야 하므로 adapting이 정답입니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: My father worked the night shift at a factory for over thirty years before he retired. During that time, our family's schedule was quite unusual. He would come home in the early morning when I was leaving for school. Consequently, he is used to _______ during the day and being active at night. Even now, years into his retirement, he often stays up late reading or watching movies and sleeps in until noon. His internal clock seems to be permanently set to that old rhythm.
problems.explanation: 'be used to ~ing'는 '~하는 것에 익숙하다'는 의미로, 여기서 'to'는 전치사입니다. 따라서 뒤에는 동명사인 sleeping이 와야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The weather forecast for this Saturday is perfect—sunny skies and a comfortable temperature. We've been cooped up indoors studying for exams all week, and I think we deserve a break. I was thinking we could pack a lunch and find a nice spot outdoors to relax and enjoy the fresh air. What do you say to _______ for a picnic in the city park? It would be a great way to de-stress before the new semester begins.
problems.explanation: 'What do you say to ~ing?'는 '~하는 게 어때?'라고 제안하는 관용 표현입니다. 여기서 'to'는 전치사이므로 뒤에는 동명사인 going이 와야 합니다.

problems.instruction: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 것은?
problems.stem: The small tech startup had been struggling for months. Despite having an innovative product, they were running out of funding and facing intense competition from larger corporations. The employees had not been paid for two weeks, and the CEO had already informed them to start looking for other jobs. The company was on the point of _______ bankrupt and shutting down its operations for good. Just then, an unexpected offer of acquisition from a major firm provided a last-minute lifeline.
problems.explanation: 'be on the point of ~ing'는 '막 ~하려는 참이다'라는 관용 표현입니다. 여기서 'of'는 전치사이므로 뒤에는 동명사인 declaring이 와야 합니다.
